title: Physical Therapy Aide
description: We're hiring a Physical Therapy Aide at Boston Scientific. This is an exciting opportunity to join our quality-obsessed, patient-centered, regulated team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Medical Devices, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Contribute to team projects and strategic initiatives
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on deliverables
Support management with analysis and reporting
Identify process improvements and efficiency opportunities
Participate in professional development and training activities
